relationships: ber:Tadamsa tazzayrit ad tuɣal ɣer unerni aseggas i d-itteddun
ber:Ad yesselmed tamaziɣt deg useggas aɣurbiz i d-itteddun
ber:Ad tesselmed tamaziɣt deg useggas aɣurbiz i d-itteddun
ber:Ad slemdeɣ tanglizit deg useggas aɣurbiz ay d-itteddun
ber:Yella ccek d ameqran dakken Tom ad yerbeḥ imalas i d-itteddun
ber:Ad ṛuḥeɣ ɣer Tmurt n Leqbayel imalas i d-itteddun
ber:Tom ad d-yuɣal s axxam imalas i d-itteddun
ber:Ad giǧǧeɣ ɣer Tmura n Leqbayel imalas i d-itteddun
ber:Ad iliɣ deg Ustṛalya tagara n yimalas d-itteddun
ber:Tom ad yekcem s aɣerbaz aseggas i d-itteddun
ber:Iyyat ad nṛuḥ ɣer Ustṛalya imalas i d-itteddun
ber:Igor yella yettxemmim ɣef tigawin-nnes d-itteddun
ber:Asafag ay d-itteddun ad yeqleɛ ɣef tis mraw
ber:Ad ṛuḥeɣ ɣer Ustṛalya imalas d-itteddun
ber:Beddel tamacint deg teɣsert ay d-itteddun
ber:Lukas yeqqim yettxemmim ɣef tigawin-nnes i d-itteddun
